name: mail-agent
comment_voice_deps: Voice surface (voice-bot.mjs): @discordjs/voice needs an Opus encoder -- opusscript (pure-JS, no native build; fine for one stream) -- and encryption, covered by node's built-in aes-256-gcm (a Discord voice mode; verified via generateDependencyReport, so no sodium lib needed). @snazzah/davey (DAVE E2EE) ships a per-platform NATIVE binding as an optionalDependency; the npm optional-deps bug (npm/cli#4828) can skip it, so the arm64-gnu binding is pinned explicitly here -- this repo is arm64-only (Colima on macOS), same reason codapi is arm64. Piper (TTS) is a binary fetched in the Dockerfile, not an npm dep.
